# ona_group (List Resource)

Lists customer-managed Ona groups for the authenticated organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_group" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group_ids` (List of String) Group IDs to include.
- `search` (String) Case-insensitive search across group name, description, and ID.
